title: Donald Trump's approval ratings hold steady among key conservative voter demographics. (唐纳德·特朗普在关键保守派选民中的支持率保持稳定。)
The former president outlines new economic policies and tax proposals for his 2024 campaign. (这位前总统为2024年竞选概述了新的经济政策和税收提案。)
Recent rallies draw large crowds as he continues his tour across vital swing states. (随着他在关键摇摆州继续巡回演讲，近期的集会吸引了大量人群。)
